overall.description: Third-person game footage showing a character in dark clothing walking through a misty canyon with towering sedimentary rock walls. A small companion creature follows behind as the character explores the narrowing passage with scattered vegetation and diffused daylight filtering through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide canyon entrance with misty atmosphere

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking forward into the canyon

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily into the canyon entrance, exploring the path ahead

notable_agents.action: small companion creature following closely behind the main character

entered.detail: tall sedimentary rock cliff face with layered striations
tall rocky cliff face with patches of green vegetation
bright sky visible through the misty canyon gap ahead
uneven rocky trail with sparse grass and dirt

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking into a wide canyon entrance with tall rock walls visible in the distance through a hazy atmosphere. The ground is an uneven rocky path, and a small companion creature follows behind. The sky is partially visible through the canyon opening ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrowing canyon passage with steep rock walls

events.description: canyon walls close in as character moves deeper into the passage

agents.ego_description: continuing through the winding canyon path as walls close in on both sides

notable_agents.action: companion creature maintaining pace behind the character

entered.detail: rock arch formation spanning across the canyon ahead
green shrubs and small plants growing at base of rock walls

segments.scene_description: The canyon narrows significantly as the character proceeds deeper, with rock walls now closer on both sides. An overhanging rock formation becomes visible ahead, and vegetation appears at the base of the walls. The sky opening is now obscured by the canyon walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep canyon passage with towering vertical walls

events.description: canyon walls become more detailed and closer, creating an enclosed feeling

agents.ego_description: walking deeper into the canyon with towering walls on both sides, approaching a narrower section

entered.detail: tight opening between rock walls visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues through the deep canyon section with towering rock walls now very close on both sides. The path leads toward a narrower passage ahead, with vegetation visible at the base of the walls. The environment feels increasingly enclosed as the canyon walls dominate the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a hazy canyon that gradually transforms from a wide entrance into a claustrophobic, towering passage. It begins with the character and a small companion walking along an uneven rocky path toward a distant opening under a partially visible sky. As the character proceeds deeper, the canyon narrows significantly, bringing the rock walls closer on both sides and introducing an overhanging formation and scattered vegetation at the base of the cliffs. The scene then shifts into a deep canyon section where the sky is completely obscured, leaving the environment feeling increasingly enclosed. Finally, the camera follows the path as it leads toward an even narrower passage, with the massive sedimentary walls dominating the entire field of view.
